THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAJI, PETE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARAH, MOHAMED URBANO, MANUEL $875.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $995.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DANIEL MEIER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANTS SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR $100.00; AN AMOUNT WHICH HAS ALREADY BEEN PAID BY DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
